options.label: Velvet (80+ shades available)
options.description: Premium stain-resistant and performance-grade velvet options

options.label: Cushion Firmness Options
options.description: Soft, medium or firm seating options

installationSupport: Basic assembly support included where required. Larger installations coordinated by Aroha team. Dedicated handling for bulk projects.
returnPolicy: Returns not applicable once production begins. Transit damage must be reported within 24 hours of delivery. Manufacturing defects resolved via repair or replacement after inspection.

warranties.title: Structural Warrenty
included: 5 years for frame (covers integrity, joinery and manufacturing defects)
excluded: Excludes misuse, excessive load, water/fire damage, unauthorized repairs year coverage

warranties.title: Upholstery
included: 1 year (covers stitching defects, foam collapse, finish peeling)
excluded: Excludes fabric fading, pet damage, sharp object tears, normal wear. year coverage
